sections.paragraph: m. pr. a staff, rod, so called from being cut off (Zab. ܓܽܘܪܡܝܺܙܐܳ a staff; the letter ר being inserted, and also ז and ד interchanged, Ch. כּוּרְמִיזָא); hence a cubit, as the German dealers, in selling silk, use Stab for the measure of two cubits. Jud. 3:16 . (Syr. ܓܘܽܡܝܺܕܐܳ a cubit, ܓܘܽܪܡܝܺܕܐܳ, ܓܪܰ ܡܚܕܺܐܳ id.)
